promotion_slots.label: Document Title
promotion_slots.description: Human-readable document title or subject when available.

promotion_slots.label: Primary Party
promotion_slots.description: Main organization, authority, sender, issuer or counterparty anchoring the document.

promotion_slots.label: Recipient Party
promotion_slots.description: Recipient, addressee or target party named by the document.

promotion_slots.label: Person Name
promotion_slots.description: Main natural person, patient, member, employee or profile subject.

promotion_slots.label: Document Identifier
promotion_slots.description: Stable document, account, invoice, contract, membership, asset or customer identifier.

promotion_slots.label: Case Identifier
promotion_slots.description: Case, permit, authority, legal or insurance reference identifier.

promotion_slots.label: Document Date
promotion_slots.description: Primary date printed on or assigned to the document.

promotion_slots.label: Due Date
promotion_slots.description: Payment, response or action due date when available.

promotion_slots.label: Period Start
promotion_slots.description: Start date of the period covered by the document.

promotion_slots.label: Period End
promotion_slots.description: End date of the period covered by the document.

promotion_slots.label: Total Amount
promotion_slots.description: Total, gross or payable monetary amount selected for document-level search and filtering.

promotion_slots.label: Balance Amount
promotion_slots.description: Remaining balance or outstanding amount when available.

promotion_slots.label: Property Address
promotion_slots.description: Property, residence, site or real-estate address anchoring the document.

promotion_slots.label: Site Name
promotion_slots.description: Technical, operational or business site name anchoring the document.

promotion_slots.label: Event Name
promotion_slots.description: Community, personal, schedule or narrative event named by the document.

promotion_slots.label: Appointment Date
promotion_slots.description: Health, personal, coaching, pastoral or community appointment date.

promotion_slots.label: Provider Name
promotion_slots.description: Service, health, coaching, care or support provider named by the document.

promotion_slots.label: Tenant Name
promotion_slots.description: Tenant or primary resident named by a housing or property document.

projections.label: Customer Communication Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Customer letters, account notices, welcome messages, service updates, and provider communication.
projections.avoid_when: Not for full invoices, detailed account statements, housing management, official notices, medical administration, or technical asset documentation.

projections.label: Community and Pastoral Care Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Memberships, community events, donations, pastoral care, and spiritual guidance for groups, associations, or congregations.
projections.avoid_when: Not for technical records, formal identity files, medical prescriptions, or property management.

projections.label: Finance Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Invoices, statements, payslips, taxes, reimbursements, as well as customer or vendor accounts and budget planning.
projections.avoid_when: Not for rent, utility charges, tenant or property management, technical specifications, identity files, or personal development records.

projections.label: Health and Care Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Medical administration, treatment plans, prescriptions, health insurance, care levels, and medical certificates.
projections.avoid_when: Not for pure identity files, pure financial reimbursements, technical maintenance logs, or community records.

projections.label: Housing and Property Management Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Housing, utility, tenancy, and property management documents with tenant, cost, or authority context.
projections.avoid_when: Not for logistics, procurement, technical execution plans, site access, or personal development plans.

projections.label: Legal and Public Administration Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Contracts, notices, permits, registrations, enforcement matters, citizen services, and benefit cases.
projections.avoid_when: Not for utility statements, logistics evidence, pure payroll, or personal reflection journals.

projections.label: Operations and Deployment Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Logistics, procurement, technical execution, deployment planning, travel instructions, access forms, and inventories.
projections.avoid_when: Not for tenancy, utility charges, or property management communication.

projections.label: People Identity Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Identity documents, master records, employment documents, education records, and personal certificates.
projections.avoid_when: Not for financial invoices, technical asset files, medical treatment plans, or community events.

projections.label: Personal Development Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Wellbeing plans, self-reflection, habit logs, coaching support, and everyday personal support.
projections.avoid_when: Not for formal medical administration, finance, legal notices, or membership registers.

projections.label: Personal Development Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Wellbeing plans, self-reflection, habit logs, coaching support, and everyday personal support.
projections.avoid_when: Not for formal medical administration, finance, legal notices, or membership registers.

projections.label: Technical and Asset Management Default v1
projections.when_to_use: Specifications, inspections, maintenance, asset or site documentation, engineering changes, quality assurance, and equipment files.
projections.avoid_when: Not for property management, pure financial records, formal identity files, or pastoral and wellbeing-related records.
